name: Oud Noir
shortDescription: A dark, resinous oud anchored by smoked leather and amber.
longDescription: Oud Noir opens with a commanding presence of dark Arabian oud, gradually revealing a heart of smoked leather and vetiver before settling into a warm amber and musk base. A fragrance of authority and quiet intensity — made for those who leave a room without raising their voice.

name: Rose de Minuit
shortDescription: Midnight rose petals wrapped in velvet musk and dark patchouli.
longDescription: Rose de Minuit is a nocturnal rose — far removed from the sun-drenched florals of the day. Dew-kissed rose petals bloom over a shadowed heart of saffron and iris, settling into a base of dark patchouli, sandalwood, and warm musk. Seductive and deeply feminine.

name: Ambre Doré
shortDescription: Warm golden amber fused with vanilla absolute and cedarwood.
longDescription: Ambre Doré is the scent of last light. Rich Omani amber blends seamlessly with bourbon vanilla absolute and the dry warmth of Atlas cedarwood, leaving a trail that lingers long after you've left the room. Comforting, luxurious, and timeless — suitable for any season.

name: Jasmin Étoilé
shortDescription: Indolic jasmine sambac with bergamot and white musk.
longDescription: Jasmin Étoilé captures the intoxicating intensity of jasmine sambac in full bloom under a starlit sky. A radiant bergamot opening gives way to the heady floral heart, before white musk and blonde woods soften it into an intimate, skin-close finish. Luminous and unforgettable.

name: Cèdre Blanc
shortDescription: Crisp white cedar with green cardamom and cool vetiver.
longDescription: Cèdre Blanc is a study in clean masculinity. It opens with a snap of green cardamom and lemon zest, pivoting to a cool, clean cedarwood heart that is fresh yet substantial. Vetiver and white musks carry it to a near-transparent dry-down — effortlessly refined.

name: Vétiver Impérial
shortDescription: Haitian vetiver with aged rum accord and dark tobacco leaf.
longDescription: Vétiver Impérial is not for the faint-hearted. Haitian vetiver — raw, smoky, and deeply rooted — is elevated by an aged rum accord and a whisper of dark tobacco leaf. The base reveals a complex sandalwood and labdanum that adds gravitas and warmth. Bold, lasting, and unmistakably masculine.

name: Iris Sauvage
shortDescription: Powdery Florentine iris root with violet leaf and cool woods.
longDescription: Iris Sauvage begins with the unmistakable cool, powdery signature of Florentine iris root — carrot-like, crystalline, and rare. Violet leaf adds a fleeting green freshness, while blonde sandalwood and ambrette seed round the composition into something deeply wearable and sophisticated.

name: Musc Sacré
shortDescription: A skin-scent musk layered with orris, ambrette, and cashmere.
longDescription: Musc Sacré is a meditation on skin. Transparent and intimate, it layers the softest white musk with orris butter, ambrette seed, and a whisper of cashmere wood. It smells like nothing else and yet like everything familiar — the perfect base for layering or a complete statement worn alone.

name: Bergamote Royale
shortDescription: Bergamot and neroli brightened by pink pepper and oakmoss.
longDescription: Bergamote Royale is a citrus chypre for the modern gentleman. Calabrian bergamot and neroli open with effortless brightness, grounded by pink pepper and a classical oakmoss and vetiver base. Crisp for the morning, sophisticated for the afternoon — an impeccable everyday signature.

name: Fleur de Nuit
shortDescription: Tuberose and orange blossom over a base of black vanilla.
longDescription: Fleur de Nuit is an ode to nocturnal blooming. Tuberose — creamy, narcotic, magnificent — is paired with orange blossom absolute and a touch of ylang ylang. The base of black vanilla, labdanum, and soft musks anchors the composition, giving it an addictive sweetness that stops just short of excess.

name: Encens Précieux
shortDescription: Sacred frankincense with myrrh, cistus, and smoky guaiac wood.
longDescription: Encens Précieux takes frankincense as its sacred starting point — resinous, luminous, and ancient. Ethiopian olibanum gives way to a heart of myrrh and cistus, their balsamic warmth deepened by guaiac wood smoke. This is a fragrance with ceremony — meditative, unhurried, and profoundly beautiful.

name: Santal Doré
shortDescription: Mysore sandalwood warmed by golden amber and soft spices.
longDescription: Santal Doré pays homage to the legendary sandalwood of Mysore — creamy, warm, and quietly opulent. A top note of cardamom and soft pink pepper eases you in, revealing a pure sandalwood heart that is then draped in golden amber and a whisper of benzoin. Rich without heaviness — a fragrance of quiet confidence.
